scripts.package:win:cpu: set NEUROWAVE_RUNTIME_DIR=runtime/python-cpu&& set NEUROWAVE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/cpu-nsis-web&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis-web --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:win:cpu:release: set NEUROWAVE_RUNTIME_DIR=runtime/python-cpu&& set NEUROWAVE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/cpu-nsis-web&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis-web --x64 --publish always
scripts.package:win:cpu:dir: set NEUROWAVE_RUNTIME_DIR=runtime/python-cpu&& set NEUROWAVE_OUTPUT_DIR=dist/cpu&& electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win dir --x64
